articles.author: Catherine Nicholls, Sophie Tanno, Lauren Kent, Tim Lister, Xiaoqian Lin, Todd Symons, Stephanie Yang, Brad Lendon, Angus Watson, Tori B. Powell, Billy Stockwell
articles.title: Live updates: US and Iran race to find crew member from downed F-15 jet - CNN
articles.description: Tehran promises reward if people hand over an American service member, while US searches for crew member in plane shot down over Iran. Follow for live updates.
articles.content:
A USF-15 fighter jet was shot down over Iran, three US sources said on Friday.
And in a separate incidenton the same day, a US militaryA-10 Thunderboltwas struck, according to a US official familiar… [+1468 chars]

articles.title: When legal sports betting surges, so do Americans' financial problems - NPR
articles.description: As online betting has grown in popularity, a new report from the New York Federal Reserve builds on the troubling link between legal sports wagering and financial health.
articles.content: Online sports betting is more popular than ever, with Americans expected to legally wager billions of dollars on this year's March Madness basketball tournament. But a growing body of evidence reveal… [+5473 chars]
